2604.25325.title: R$^3$-SQL: Ranking Reward and Resampling for Text-to-SQL
2604.25325.paper_summary: Modern Text-to-SQL systems generate multiple candidate SQL queries and rank them to judge a final prediction. However, existing methods face two limitations. First, they often score functionally equivalent SQL queries inconsistently despite identical execution results. Second, ranking cannot recover when the correct SQL is absent from the candidate pool. We propose R$^3$-SQL, a Text-to-SQL framework that addresses both issues through unified reward for ranking and resampling. R$^3$-SQL first groups candidates by execution result and ranks groups for consistency. To score each group, it combines a pairwise preference across groups with a pointwise utility from the best group rank and size, capturing relative preference, consistency, and candidate quality. To improve candidate recall, R$^3$-SQL introduces agentic resampling, which judges the generated candidate pool and selectively resamples when the correct SQL is likely absent. R$^3$-SQL achieves 75.03 execution accuracy on BIRD-dev, a new state of the art among methods using models with disclosed sizes, with consistent gains across five benchmarks.
2604.25325.paper_summary_zh: 現代的文本到 SQL 系統生成多個候選 SQL 查詢並對其進行排名以判斷最終預測。然而，現有的方法面臨兩個限制。首先，儘管執行結果相同，它們經常對功能上等價的 SQL 查詢進行不一致的評分。其次，當候選池中缺少正確的 SQL 時，排名無法恢復。我們提出 R$^3$-SQL，一個通過統一獎勵來解決這兩個問題的文本到 SQL 框架。R$^3$-SQL 首先根據執行結果對候選進行分組並對組進行排名以確保一致性。為了對每個組進行評分，它將跨組的成對偏好與最佳組的排名和大小的逐點效用結合起來，捕捉相對偏好、一致性和候選質量。為了提高候選的召回率，R$^3$-SQL 引入了代理重抽樣，該方法評估生成的候選池並在正確的 SQL 可能缺失時進行選擇性重抽樣。R$^3$-SQL 在 BIRD-dev 上實現了 75.03 的執行準確率，這是使用已披露大小模型的方法中的新技術，並且在五個基準測試中均有穩定的增益。
2604.25325.author: Hojae Han et.al.
2604.25325.authors: Hojae Han, Yeonseok Jeong, Seung-won Hwang, Zhewei Yao, Yuxiong He
